name: honeycomb
description: Query and explore Honeycomb observability data with secure credential management

honeycomb_management_key.description: Honeycomb Management API key (format: keyID:secret). Get one from Team Settings → API Keys in Honeycomb.

honeycomb_team_slug.description: Your Honeycomb team slug (visible in the URL when logged into Honeycomb)

honeycomb_api_base.description: Honeycomb API base URL (default: https://api.honeycomb.io). Use https://api.eu1.honeycomb.io for EU.
